prompt: Generate one icon from merging two icons in a colomn and then color the icon according to the gradient in the reference image.
prompt_refined: Generate a single, new rounded square icon. This icon should creatively combine visual elements from the App Store icon (image 1, top-left) and the LINE icon (image 1, bottom-left) to form a cohesive merged symbol. The merged icon should then be filled with the smooth blue-to-green gradient observed in image 2. The background of the new icon should remain solid black, consistent with image 1.
objects: A-shape or triangle element (from App Store icon)
speech bubble shape element (from LINE icon)
